zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Reynolds於1430年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特時，她的父親Walter Reynell VIII36歲，母親Joan Walrond26歲。她於1446年與Thomas Richard Wightman在英國萊希斯特斯爾布爾巴結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1463年在她的家鄉享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Reynolds于1430年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特时，她的父亲Walter Reynell VIII36岁，母亲Joan Walrond26岁。她于1446年与Thomas Richard Wightman在英国萊希斯特斯爾布爾巴结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1463年在她的家乡享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Reynolds
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Reynold , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Leitrim): in Ulster the English name in 1 above was substituted for Mac Raghnaill; see McReynolds .
History: Christopher Reynolds of Gravesend, Kent, England, arrived in America sometime before his marriage in 1644 in Isle of Wight County, VA.

variants.name: Reynold
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Reinald, Reynaud (ancient Germanic Raginald, from ragin ‘counsel, decision’ + wald ‘rule, ruler’), first introduced to England by Scandinavian settlers in the Old Norse form Rögnvaldr (see Ronald ) and greatly reinforced after the Conquest by the Norman forms Reinald and Reynaud, which often appear Latinized as Reginaldus. The surname was later much confused with Raynor and Renard . The surname is occasionally also borne by Jews, in which case it presumably represents an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Reynolds was born in 1430, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, her father, Walter Reynell VIII, was 36 and her mother, Joan Walrond, was 26. She married Thomas Richard Wightman in 1446, in Burbage, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1463, in her hometown, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Reynolds est née en 1430, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Reynell VIII, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Walrond, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Richard Wightman en 1446, à Burbage, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1463, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Reynolds 1430 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Reynell VIII 36 und ihre Mutter Joan Walrond 26. Sie hat 1446 in Burbage, Leicestershire, England Thomas Richard Wightman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 33 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Reynolds è nata il nel 1430 nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Walter Reynell VIII, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Joan Walrond, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Richard Wightman nel 1446, nel Burbage, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1463, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Reynoldsが1430年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターで生まれた時，父Walter Reynell VIIIは36歳，母Joan Walrondは26歳であった。1446年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルバッジでThomas Richard Wightmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1463年に故郷で33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Reynolds(이)가 1430년 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Reynell VIII(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Walrond(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1446년 영국 레이스스터실르 버바지에서 Thomas Richard Wightman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 그녀의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Reynolds nasceu em 1430, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Reynell VIII, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan Walrond, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Richard Wightman em 1446, em Burbage, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1463, em sua cidade natal, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Reynolds родилась в 1430 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Reynell VIII было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Walrond, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Richard Wightman в 1446 г. в местности бурбадж, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1463 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Reynolds nació en 1430, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Reynell VIII, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan Walrond, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Thomas Richard Wightman en 1446, en Burbage, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1463, en su pueblo, a la edad de 33 años.
